sources.name: Nike Training Club
sources.principle: A premium app needs guided sessions across strength, conditioning, yoga and mobility.

sources.name: Strava Training Log
sources.principle: Training history should be visual, filterable and updated every time the athlete logs a session.

sources.name: Freeletics Coach
sources.principle: The coach should adapt sessions based on available days, equipment and in-the-moment adjustments.

sources.name: Fitbod Algorithm
sources.principle: Recommendations should consider recent muscle use, goal, equipment and workout history.
